title: OPEC+ crude/condensate loadings flat as drop from Saudi Arabia offset by other Middle East and Africa
section_path: OPEC+ crude/condensate loadings flat as drop from Saudi Arabia offset by other Middle East and Africa
section_path_text: OPEC+ crude/condensate loadings flat as drop from Saudi Arabia offset by other Middle East and Africa
summary:
Main
By Jay Maroo
Total OPEC+ crude/condensate loadings in October stood at around 29.5, of which OPEC Middle East's contributed 18.5mbd - both totals show little change from September. But within the Middle East, the m-o-m change in Saudi loadings showed a sharp contrast to those elsewhere in the region. Image reference: Jay-Chart-1.png | assets/2022-11-04_opec-crudecondensate-loadings-flat-as-drop-from-saudi-arabia-offset-by-other-mid_img_jay-chart-1_035fd80b0f42.png
OPEC+ crude/condensate loadings by region (mbd)
Saudi loadings fell by 570kbd on the month in October, the largest drop observed since March 2022.
